title: Price Observation Record
description: A price observation is a single measured price point for a product, listing, or combination. Multiple price observations can be derived from one listing record when different price types, quantities, or promotions apply.

listing_id.description: Listing record ID if this observation was derived from a listing.

price.description: Numeric price value in the observation currency.

package_quantity.description: Number of dosage units this price covers.

unit_price.description: Normalized price per single dosage unit. null when package_quantity is missing.

daily_cost.description: Normalized cost per day based on the labeled or declared daily dose. null when dose is unknown.

daily_cost_source.description: Source of the daily dose used in calculation.

daily_dose_used.description: Numeric daily dose value used in the daily cost calculation.

formula.description: Human-readable formula used for calculations (e.g., "129.00 / 30 = 4.30 per tablet", "4.30 * 2 tablets/day = 8.60 USD/d").

assumptions.description: List of assumptions made during normalization (e.g., "assumed 30-day month", "assumed 2 capsules per day per label").

includes_shipping.description: Whether the observed price includes shipping. true, false, or omitted.

includes_tax.description: Whether the observed price includes tax. true, false, or omitted.

promotion_details.description: Description of promotions applied (e.g., "buy 2 get 1 free", "10% off first order").

gift_or_bonus.description: Description of any gift or bonus items included with this price (e.g., "free travel-size").

exchange_rate.description: Exchange rate used if currency conversion was applied.

data_quality_notes.description: Quality concerns specific to this price observation.
